falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) the synthetic-control ATT on output volume is not negative and significant at 5% across autonomy-loss episodes, OR (b) Norway's post-1972 placebo shows negative divergence comparable to autonomy-loss cases (which would indicate the discriminating variable is ownership not autonomy), OR (c) any single autonomy-loss-nationalisation produced sustained output outperformance of 20%+ over 10 years vs synthetic control.

variables_missing.name: capex_per_barrel_or_tonne
variables_missing.source: constructed: extractor capex / output; requires per-company annual reports for Repsol, PDVSA, YPF, Equinor

variables_missing.name: productivity_output_per_worker
variables_missing.source: constructed: extractor headcount / physical output; per-episode

variables_missing.name: nationalisation_with_autonomy_loss
variables_missing.source: constructed: binary = 1 where state assumed operational control AND documented technocratic-autonomy reduction (staff purge, political appointment of technical managers, revenue diversion to general budget)

variables_missing.name: prior_output_trend
variables_missing.source: constructed: pre-treatment 5-year volume trend per episode
